text.message: Hello, this is Chris. I think John took my normal name
Good - everyone can go after BiggDogg like they usually do anyway
this reminds me of the time I visited Denali National Park but skipped Glacier Bay
I can break his longest road with a wood from anyone
yeah, I miscounted when I was building the road and thought it'd just win me the game
shouild have just built a settlement
I want ore but I don't want to trade with anyone...
Really should have been on a 6 this game
you were too built up there
I assumed someone would win a while ago
How did you not win Patrick?
to take the longest road away from patrick
